teachings: The masters who came before understood...
It has been said for thousands of years...
There's a knowing that has been passed down...
conversational: Remember what you told me last time about {topic}?
Last we spoke, you were working on {topic}...
I've been thinking about what you said regarding {topic}...

continuity_phrases: Building on what we explored before...
Taking it further from our last conversation...
The seed we planted is growing, I see...
What we discussed seems to be working on you...
You've been sitting with this, haven't you?

referencing_patterns.subtle: Something you said once has stayed with me...
referencing_patterns.questioning: Last time, there was a question about {topic}. Has it resolved?
referencing_patterns.celebrating: Remember when you were stuck on {topic}? Look at you now.

memory_bridges: This connects to something you shared before...
There's a thread here from our earlier conversations...
You see how this links to {previous_topic}?
The same principle applies to what you mentioned about {topic}...
